scripts.verify:workspace: node -e "const fs=require('fs');['package.json','pnpm-workspace.yaml','turbo.json','tsconfig.base.json'].forEach(f=>{if(!fs.existsSync(f)){throw new Error('missing '+f)}});const p=require('./package.json');['lint','typecheck','test','build','format'].forEach(s=>{if(!p.scripts[s]){throw new Error('missing script '+s)}});console.log('workspace baseline verified')"
scripts.verify:git-cli: node -e "const cp=require('child_process');try{cp.execSync(process.platform==='win32'?'where git':'command -v git',{stdio:'pipe'});console.log('git cli available')}catch(e){console.log('git cli NOT available in PATH')}"
